posts.author: kwalker (Kristian Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Do you have a requirement to send a weekly status email showing what items have changed status on your board in the previous 7 days.

If so the app Advanced Automations for Monday.com can help you to do this.

Once you install the app you can configure the template named Send a weekly notification reporting status changes of items in a board in order to achieve this requirement.

You can see more detailed information on how the app works in its documentation page here.

Regards,
Kristian
